zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilda de Hesdin於大約1065年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀斯丁時，她的父親Ernulf de Hesdin28歲，母親Ammeline de Baladon28歲。她和Patrick de Chaources至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1133年之後在英國英格蘭貝德福爾托丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hesdin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Longford and Leitrim): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEislin, a shortened form of the older Ó hEisleanáin ‘descendant of Eisleanán’, a byname probably derived from éislinn ‘unsafe, weak’.

English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Alselin, from ancient Germanic Anselin, with assimilatory change of n to the following -l-. This is a French form of ancient Germanic Ans(e)helm, composed of the elements ans- ‘(pagan) god’ and helm- ‘helmet’; compare Anselm .
English: topographic name for a dweller ‘(by the) hazel copse’, from Old English hæsling, or a habitational name from any of various minor places called with this word.

variants.name: Henslin
meanings: Irish: possibly a variant of   Heslin  .
South German: from a pet form of   Hensel   (see   Hans  ).

variants.name: Anselm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Heinz.

English and German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Anshelm, composed of the elements ans- ‘god’ + helm ‘protection, helmet’. The personal name was taken to France and England by St. Anselm (c. 1033–1109), known as the Father of Scholasticism. He was born in Aosta, Italy, joined the Benedictine order at Bec in Normandy, France, and in 1093 became archbishop of Canterbury, England.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilda de Hesdin was born about 1065, in Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Ernulf de Hesdin, was 28 and her mother, Ammeline de Baladon, was 28. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Patrick de Chaources. She died after 1133, in Toddington, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Patrick de Chaources. Elle est décédée après 1133, à Toddington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Hesdin(이)가 대략 1065년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 헤즈딘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ernulf de Hesdin(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ammeline de Baladon(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Patrick de Chaources(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1133년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 토딩턴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilda de Hesdin родилась около 1065 г. в местности хесдин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Ernulf de Hesdin было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ammeline de Baladon, 28. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Patrick de Chaources. Она умерла после 1133 г. в местности тоддингтон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
